Quote: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
Author: Steve Jobs

Quote: Life is what happens when you're busy making other plans.
Author: John Lennon

Quote: The future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams.
Author: Eleanor Roosevelt

Quote: You only live once, but if you do it right, once is enough.
Author: Mae West

Quote: I love you without knowing how, or when, or from where.
Author: Pablo Neruda

Quote: Success is not final, failure is not fatal: it is the courage to continue that counts.
Author: Winston Churchill

Quote: Be yourself; everyone else is already taken.
Author: Oscar Wilde

Quote: You know you're in love when you can't fall asleep because reality is finally better than your dreams.
Author: Dr. Seuss

Quote: The best time to plant a tree was 20 years ago. The second best time is now.
Author: Chinese Proverb

Quote: I'm not afraid of death; I just don't want to be there when it happens.
Author: Woody Allen

Quote: To love and be loved is to feel the sun from both sides.
Author: David Viscott

Quote: Don't watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
Author: Sam Levenson

Quote: My doctor told me I have a week to live. I told him I want a second opinion. He said, 'Okay, you're ugly too.'
Author: Unknown

Quote: We accept the love we think we deserve.
Author: Stephen Chbosky

Quote: The way to get started is to quit talking and begin doing.
Author: Walt Disney

Quote: Before you marry a person, you should first make them use a computer with slow internet to see who they really are.
Author: Will Ferrell

Quote: Love is composed of a single soul inhabiting two bodies.
Author: Aristotle

Quote: It does not matter how slowly you go as long as you do not stop.
Author: Confucius

Quote: I find television very educating. Every time somebody turns on the set, I go into the other room and read a book.
Author: Groucho Marx

Quote: The best thing to hold onto in life is each other.
Author: Audrey Hepburn

Quote: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
Author: Theodore Roosevelt

Quote: I used to think I was indecisive, but now I'm not so sure.
Author: Unknown

Quote: Love is when the other person's happiness is more important than your own.
Author: H. Jackson Brown Jr.

Quote: Your time is limited, don't waste it living someone else's life.
Author: Steve Jobs

Quote: I'm on a whiskey diet. I've lost three days already.
Author: Tommy Cooper

Quote: Love is friendship that has caught fire.
Author: Ann Landers

Quote: The secret of getting ahead is getting started.
Author: Mark Twain

Quote: If at first you don't succeed, then skydiving definitely isn't for you.
Author: Steven Wright

Quote: Being deeply loved by someone gives you strength, while loving someone deeply gives you courage.
Author: Lao Tzu

Quote: The harder you work for something, the greater you'll feel when you achieve it.
Author: Unknown

Quote: I'm not arguing, I'm just explaining why I'm right.
Author: Unknown

Quote: You don't love someone for their looks, or their clothes, or for their fancy car, but because they sing a song only you can hear.
Author: Unknown

Quote: Don't let yesterday take up too much of today.
Author: Will Rogers

Quote: I told my wife she was drawing her eyebrows too high. She looked surprised.
Author: Unknown

Quote: Love is not finding someone to live with, it's finding someone you can't live without.
Author: Rafael Ortiz

Quote: It always seems impossible until it's done.
Author: Nelson Mandela

Quote: I'm reading a book on anti-gravity. It's impossible to put down.
Author: Unknown

Quote: The greatest happiness of life is the conviction that we are loved.
Author: Victor Hugo

Quote: Start where you are. Use what you have. Do what you can.
Author: Arthur Ashe

Quote: I'm so good at sleeping, I can do it with my eyes closed.
Author: Unknown

Quote: In all the world, there is no heart for me like yours. In all the world, there is no love for you like mine.
Author: Maya Angelou

Quote: What you get by achieving your goals is not as important as what you become by achieving your goals.
Author: Zig Ziglar

Quote: I'm not saying I'm Batman. I'm just saying no one has ever seen me and Batman in the same room together.
Author: Unknown

Quote: Love is like the wind, you can't see it but you can feel it.
Author: Nicholas Sparks

Quote: The only person you are destined to become is the person you decide to be.
Author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

Quote: My favorite machine at the gym is the vending machine.
Author: Unknown

Quote: You are my sun, my moon, and all my stars.
Author: E.E. Cummings

Quote: Hardships often prepare ordinary people for an extraordinary destiny.
Author: C.S. Lewis

Quote: I'm on a seafood diet. I see food and I eat it.
Author: Unknown

Quote: Love is an untamed force. When we try to control it, it destroys us. When we try to imprison it, it enslaves us.
Author: Paulo Coelho

Quote: The difference between ordinary and extraordinary is that little extra.
Author: Jimmy Johnson

Quote: I'm not clumsy. I'm just testing the gravity theory.
Author: Unknown

Quote: When you realize you want to spend the rest of your life with somebody, you want the rest of your life to start as soon as possible.
Author: Nora Ephron

Quote: Whether you think you can or you think you can't, you're right.
Author: Henry Ford

Quote: I'm not getting older, I'm just becoming a classic.
Author: Unknown

Quote: We loved with a love that was more than love.
Author: Edgar Allan Poe

Quote: The only limit to our realization of tomorrow is our doubts of today.
Author: Franklin D. Roosevelt

Quote: I'm so clever that sometimes I don't understand a single word of what I'm saying.
Author: Oscar Wilde

Quote: You have bewitched me, body and soul, and I love you.
Author: Jane Austen

Quote: The best way to predict the future is to create it.
Author: Peter Drucker

Quote: I'm not short, I'm just concentrated awesome.
Author: Unknown

Quote: I saw that you were perfect, and so I loved you. Then I saw that you were not perfect and I loved you even more.
Author: Angelita Lim

Quote: Dream big and dare to fail.
Author: Norman Vaughan

Quote: My bed is a magical place where I suddenly remember everything I forgot to do.
Author: Unknown

Quote: I would rather spend one lifetime with you, than face all the ages of this world alone.
Author: J.R.R. Tolkien

Quote: Act as if what you do makes a difference. It does.
Author: William James

Quote: I'm not weird, I'm limited edition.
Author: Unknown

Quote: You are the finest, loveliest, tenderest, and most beautiful person I have ever known.
Author: F. Scott Fitzgerald

Quote: Keep your face always toward the sunshine - and shadows will fall behind you.
Author: Walt Whitman

Quote: I'm not lazy, I'm on energy-saving mode.
Author: Unknown

Quote: Every love story is beautiful, but ours is my favorite.
Author: Unknown

Quote: What lies behind us and what lies before us are tiny matters compared to what lies within us.
Author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

Quote: I'm in shape. Round is a shape.
Author: Unknown

Quote: You are my today and all of my tomorrows.
Author: Leo Christopher

Quote: The only person you should try to be better than is the person you were yesterday.
Author: Unknown

Quote: I'm not a complete idiot, some parts are missing.
Author: Unknown

Quote: You are the piece of me I wish I didn't need.
Author: Unknown

Quote: The journey of a thousand miles begins with one step.
Author: Lao Tzu

Quote: I'm great at multitasking. I can waste time, be unproductive, and procrastinate all at once.
Author: Unknown

Quote: I look at you and see the rest of my life in front of my eyes.
Author: Unknown

Quote: Fall seven times and stand up eight.
Author: Japanese Proverb

Quote: I put my phone in airplane mode, but it's not flying.
Author: Unknown

Quote: I love you more than coffee, but please don't make me prove it.
Author: Unknown

Quote: It is never too late to be what you might have been.
Author: George Eliot

Quote: I'm not arguing, I'm just passionately expressing my point of view.
Author: Unknown

Quote: You are my heart, my life, my one and only thought.
Author: Arthur Conan Doyle

Quote: The only way to achieve the impossible is to believe it is possible.
Author: Charles Kingsleigh

Quote: I'm on a strict diet of cookies, cake, and ice cream. It's called the 'see-food' diet.
Author: Unknown

Quote: If I know what love is, it is because of you.
Author: Hermann Hesse

Quote: If you want to lift yourself up, lift up someone else.
Author: Booker T. Washington

Quote: I'm not saying I'm perfect. I'm just saying I'm an expert at being me.
Author: Unknown

Quote: You are the best thing that ever happened to me.
Author: Unknown

Quote: The man who moves a mountain begins by carrying away small stones.
Author: Confucius

Quote: I'm not old, I'm retro.
Author: Unknown

Quote: I never want to stop making memories with you.
Author: Unknown

Quote: The sun himself is weak when he first rises, and gathers strength and courage as the day gets on.
Author: Charles Dickens

Quote: I'm in a relationship with food and it's getting pretty serious.
Author: Unknown

Quote: You are my paradise and I would happily get stranded on you.
Author: Unknown

Quote: Do what you can, with what you have, where you are.
Author: Theodore Roosevelt
